react_icons.reason: Fallback icon; SiMicrophone is preferred but verifying slug

downloaded_assets.title: Magical Glowing Book
downloaded_assets.description: A close-up of a child's hands holding a book illuminated by magical string lights, creating a warm and enchanting feel.
downloaded_assets.visual_description: Close-up of a child's hands and torso, wearing a soft brown shirt, holding an open book. Warm golden string lights are draped over the book, casting a magical glow. Soft bokeh background.
downloaded_assets.color_notes: Warm golden ambers, deep browns, and soft cream. Excellent for 'magical' storytelling themes.
downloaded_assets.alt_text: Child reading a magical glowing book with warm lights
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Perfectly captures the 'Khayal' (Imagination) aspect with its magical lighting and child-centric focus.

downloaded_assets.title: Little Egyptian Princess
downloaded_assets.description: A high-quality portrait of a young girl dressed in traditional Ancient Egyptian attire, standing in a desert setting.
downloaded_assets.visual_description: Full-body portrait of a young girl with long dark hair, wearing a white pleated Egyptian gown, golden crown with cobra symbol, and elaborate beaded collar. Desert dunes in the background under a soft sky.
downloaded_assets.color_notes: Desert sand beiges, gold accents, and bright turquoise beads. Strong cultural Egyptian theme.
downloaded_assets.alt_text: Little girl dressed as an Egyptian princess in the desert
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Directly addresses the 'Egyptian' theme requested, providing a high-quality cultural touchstone for the app's visual identity.

downloaded_assets.title: Stylized Character Reference
downloaded_assets.description: A charming portrait of a young child with vibrant cultural jewelry, serving as a character style reference for stories.
downloaded_assets.visual_description: Portrait of a young girl with a joyful expression, wearing a beaded headpiece and golden earrings. Soft natural forest background, warm skin tones.
downloaded_assets.color_notes: Warm browns, bright red and white bead accents, golden jewelry glints.
downloaded_assets.alt_text: Cute child character with beaded jewelry for storybook reference
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Serves as an excellent 'before' or 'style reference' for the AI-generated storybook characters.

downloaded_assets.title: Subtle Paper Texture
downloaded_assets.description: A clean, off-white textured paper background, perfect for use as a scroll or story page backdrop.
downloaded_assets.visual_description: Uniform, high-resolution texture of off-white paper with subtle grain and occasional darker flecks. Minimalist and non-distracting.
downloaded_assets.alt_text: Subtle off-white paper texture for story scroll
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Requested 'scroll' texture that isn't too heavy or distracting for reading text in the story previewer.

downloaded_assets.title: Magical Mesh Gradient
downloaded_assets.description: A vibrant and soft abstract gradient featuring warm orange and cool purple tones.
downloaded_assets.visual_description: Smooth radial transitions between soft orange, pastel purple, and hints of gold. Atmospheric and ethereal.
downloaded_assets.color_notes: Pastel purple (#DBAAC2), soft orange, and warm pinks.
downloaded_assets.alt_text: Magical orange and purple mesh gradient background
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Alternative background for the hero or onboarding sections to reinforce the 'magical' theme.

missing_assets.reason: Could not find a high-quality, verified standalone SVG for a Pyramid/Sphinx that fits the playful theme; recommend using SiPyramid if available or a custom CSS shape.
Official logo not found on domain; suggest using a stylized 'K' with a playful font (e.g., Fredoka One) and the primary magical color.

css_textures.description: Soft radial gradients for a magical, dreamy atmosphere
Subtle dot pattern to give a 'creative workshop' feel to photo upload steps

usage_notes: Use 'hero-magical-book.jpg' as the primary hero image for the landing page.
Use 'bg-paper-texture.jpg' as the background for the <div> containing the story text to simulate a parchment scroll.
The 'hero-egyptian-princess.jpg' image is portrait; use it in a sidebar or as a featured story cover rather than a full-width top hero.
Layer the 'bg-magical-mesh.jpg' at low opacity (10-20%) over sections to add warmth without reducing readability.
